result:
Fleshed the brief at `/workspace/nexus-mk2/.scratch/patron-anima-eval/eval-a/reps/3/patron-flesh/session-viewing.md`.

Key moves:

- **Reframed the surface.** The brief said "this page" implying a new one; I placed it as a **Sessions tab in the Spider** instead (#26, #27). Spider already owns engine views, already has the transcript component the brief wants to reuse, and already has the streaming infrastructure we're fixing.
- **Promoted the streaming fix to root work.** The brief mentioned it as a note ("also fix in Spider"); I made it the prerequisite. Fix the source, one fix serves two consumers (#31).
- **Named reader/decision/frequency** (me, three specific decisions, many times/day) since the brief was silent (#22).
- **Cut hard on scope** — no filters, no charts, no analytics, no roll-ups (#23, #25, #18).
- **Cost is computed on read**, not persisted (#19).
- **Colocated cancel on the row, tooltip on the cost cell** (#40).
- **Content-bearing fallback** for missing writ title (role + first prompt line, not a timestamp) (#41).
- **Fail-loud on cancel races**, no retries (#2, #4).

Deferred questions flag the real verification points: Spider tab architecture, session record structure/granularity, session volume, streaming bug's true root cause.
